name: Broccoli Cheese Soup (Mcdonald's)
recipeIngredient: 5 oz Frozen chopped broccoli, thawed and drained
1 slice Kraft Singles Cheddar, cut into bits
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the first six ingredients in a blender and blend on high until smooth.
2. Remove larger pieces of broccoli and blend those until very fine.
3. Set aside 3/4 cup of cooking water from the broccoli and discard the rest.
4. Pour the blended mixture into the top of a double boiler over simmering water, stirring until smooth and thickened.
5. Stir in the reserved cooking water and finely diced broccoli.
6. Add the remaining ingredients.
